title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Law, Tama, Kaido, Unknown person #6, Straw Hat Pirates as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, after my soul left my old body...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That new kid, here, was about to absorb me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Consider these black balls a parting gift!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was like she swiped me from her...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ive been given a new lease on life!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! I didn't sign up for an annoying, sentient weapon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's right! You still haven't forgiven me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But... I can't leave without Mama's powers!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: It's time to start giving orders, TAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I have more news for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's all because of her isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She keeps converting our allies To your side one by one,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How can she still be standing?

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: It's your fault pay-pay is hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought I already told you < to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami, you can use your TACT like usual!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But her insides must be messed up after what Mama did!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll go down in one shot if we strike her with a thunderbolt!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can't use an attack that big!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I split them up!! Do it now, Nami!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 50 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
